title: Russia welcomes arrival of oil tanker in Cuba after Trump softens approach to U.S. blockade
summary_full: A Russian oil tanker carrying a humanitarian shipment of 100,000 tons of crude oil reportedly arrived in Cuba on Monday.
summary_public: A Russian oil tanker carrying a humanitarian shipment of 100,000 tons of crude oil reportedly arrived in Cuba on Monday.

RU.label: negative
RU.evidence: Russia welcomes arrival of oil tanker in Cuba
